---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
---

You can download my full CV here: [Download CV (PDF)](files/CV.pdf){target="_blank"}

---

## Education

| Degree | Institution | Year |
|--------|-------------|------|
| Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering | The Ohio State University | 2026 (expected) |
| M.S. in Mechanical Engineering | The Ohio State University | 2023 |
| B.S. in Mechanical Engineering | Bangladesh University of Engineering & Technology | 2018 |

## Professional Experience

### Graduate Research Associate
*The Ohio State University, Center for Automotive Research* | Jan 2021 -- Dec 2025

- Designed physics-aware deep reinforcement learning (SAC, PPO, GRPO) frameworks for hybrid-electric powertrain energy management, achieving fuel consumption within 1.1--4.8% of the dynamic programming optimum while reducing battery degradation by up to 88%.
- Developed a Physics-Informed Transformer Model for battery capacity fade prediction, reducing estimation error to 2.96% across 17 cells from 5 experimental datasets.
- Built and validated physics-based aging models for battery, electric machine, and aftertreatment system, integrated into a forward-looking MATLAB/Simulink powertrain simulator.
- Proposed a critic-free policy optimization method (A-GRPO) using Transformer policies and trajectory-level advantage ranking for long-horizon constrained control.
- Delivered technical results to Cummins Inc. through regular milestone reviews and progress reporting.

### Graduate Teaching Assistant
*The Ohio State University* | Jan 2026 -- Present

- Lead recitation sections and office hours for ME 3501: Introduction to Engineering Thermodynamics.

### Lecturer, Dept. of Mechanical Engineering
*Bangladesh Army University of Science and Technology* | Jun 2019 -- Dec 2020

- Taught undergraduate courses (Numerical Analysis, Engineering Mechanics, Mechanics of Materials).
- Served as Departmental Program Coordinator.

## Technical Skills

| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| **Languages** | Python, MATLAB, C, C++ |
| **AI/ML** | PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn; Transformers, RNN/LSTM; RL (SAC, PPO, TD3, GRPO) |
| **Optimization** | Dynamic Programming, MINLP, MDP, NSGA-II, Multi-Objective Optimization, CasADi |
| **Modeling & Sim** | MATLAB/Simulink, LAMMPS |
| **Tools** | Git, LaTeX, CUDA, Docker, AutoCAD, SOLIDWORKS |

## Awards

- University Merit Scholarship, Dept. of Mechanical Engineering, BUET (2014)
- Dean's List Award, Dept. of Mechanical Engineering, BUET (2015, 2017)
